message:
Implement comptime eval detection + split compiler.zig

- Add comptime eval detection in codegen (string literal → comptime path)
- Split compiler.zig (553→357 lines) by extracting utils to compiler_utils.zig
- Fix Zig 0.15 ArrayList API in bytecode.zig
- Add LRU cache for eval bytecode (from previous batch)
- Fix .build/ utils copy issue
